form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 531m at Gawler. Safely held last time and looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 531m at Gawler. Safely held last time and looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching turn into home straight.
Lost ground turn into home straight first occasion.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.51) when fourth over 455m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (26.51) when fourth over 455m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.49) when fifth over 530m at Angle Park in a Invitation. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and seven minors. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (31.49) when fifth over 530m at Angle Park in a Invitation. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and seven minors. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 2 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a flying 25.38 over the 455m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance leading throughout to score by 2 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a flying 25.38 over the 455m journey. Has the ability and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at Gawler over 400m in 22.86. Followed that up with a minor placing over 400m at Gawler at OPEN five days ago. In form and another win would not surprise.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at Gawler over 400m in 22.86. Followed that up with a minor placing over 400m at Gawler at OPEN five days ago. In form and another win would not surprise.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Midway through the first turn was forced wide, was hampered and lost ground.
Hampered by contact in the first turn.

form.formComment: Was strongly supported last time but ran below expectations when fifth over 595m at Angle Park in 35.43. Can measure up if she runs to her best.

formComments.comment: Was strongly supported last time but ran below expectations when fifth over 595m at Angle Park in 35.43. Can measure up if she runs to her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked approaching turn into back straight.
Checked first turn; Checked entering home straight.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing fourth (19.90) at Angle Park last start. Boxed out wide and needs to find best form to feature.
